minimal_missing_lemma: CountingFiberSeparationFromNonProp supplies the NonProp invariant required by CountingToMassUnderNonPropInvariant.
boundary: Does not prove ordinary CountingFiberSeparationFromNonProp alone implies FiberMassBalanceFromNonProp unless the extraction hypothesis is supplied.
Does not prove P vs NP.
Does not solve any Clay problem.
